Helmdeck UI not built

This is the committed placeholder. It exists so go:embed compiles before the React/Vite bundle has been built. Reaching this page in production means the deployed image was built without the web stage.

To build the UI locally:

cd web && npm ci && npm run build

To get a self-consistent production image: build via the multi-stage Dockerfile (deploy/docker/control-plane.Dockerfile) — the Node stage runs the build inside the image, so the bundle is always in sync.

See github.com/tosin2013/helmdeck.
